back_translation: Happiness belongs to the one who does not walk according to the advice of the wicked, does not stand in the way of sinners, and does not sit in the seat of those who love to mock.
But his delight is in the law of the LORD, and he meditates on His law both day and night.
He is like a tree planted beside streams of water, which yields its fruit in season, and its leaves do not wither; everything he does prospers and flourishes.
The wicked are not so, but are like chaff that the wind blows away.
Therefore the wicked will not be able to stand firm in the judgment, and sinners will not stand in the assembly of the righteous.
For the LORD knows the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked will perish.
